specs.name: memory-safety-patterns
specs.description: Implement memory-safe programming with RAII, ownership, smart pointers, and resource management across Rust, C++, and C. Use when writing safe systems code, managing resources, or preventing memory bugs.

specs.name: rust-cli-builder
specs.description: Plan and build production-ready Rust CLI tools using clap for argument parsing, with subcommands, config file support, colored output, and proper error handling. Uses interview-driven planning to clarify commands, input/output formats, and distribution strategy before writing any code.
